hunter_likelihood_reason: Company mainly provides welfare support, staff education, and nursing personnel introduction (看護人材紹介) for the Tohoku Fukushi University group, falling under the nursing/care vertical exclusion.
notes: Official company site confirmed at https://f-kobo.co.jp/. Contact page has a web inquiry form but no public business email. Company is a welfare/community support business (Tohoku Fukushi University group) focused on nursing/care sector, not a headhunter.
